name: Prison Escape Puzzle Master
description: Think prison life is boring? Think again! Prison Master: Escape Journey 3D turns everyday life into a thrilling strategy adventure. Explore hidden corners, collect valuable tools, and find clever ways to outsmart the guard. Your mission is to find a way out, no matter the risk. Stay sharp, move wisely, and build your route to freedom in this thrilling 3D adventure. Every decision matters in Prison Escape Puzzle Master: Escape Journey. Whether you’re planning or making deals, each move takes you one step closer to freedom - or total failure.
instructions: Mouse Controlled Hold the left mouse button and drag to draw a path Tap the player to start moving along the drawn track Avoid searchlights laser beams and hurdles to escape safely
